---
title: "Genetic Tools"
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-header">
  <h1>Genetic Tools</h1>
  <p class="subtitle">Resources for the community.</p>
</div>

<div class="research-grid">

  <div class="research-card">
    <span class="output-tag">Nature Communications 2024</span>
    <h3>Kalium Channelrhodopsins (KCR)</h3>
    <p>
      Comparative evaluation of light-gated potassium-conducting channelrhodopsins
      as neuronal inhibitors in <em class="species">Drosophila</em>, <em class="species">C. elegans</em>, and zebrafish.
      KCR1-ET matches ACR1 potency while avoiding the depolarising artefact that
      chloride conductance produces in high-chloride cells &mdash; including axons.
    </p>
    <a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-024-47203-w">&rarr; Nature Communications</a>
  </div>

  <div class="research-card">
    <span class="output-tag">bioRxiv 2026</span>
    <h3>LSSmScarlet3 for Two-Photon Imaging</h3>
    <p>
      A long-Stokes-shift mScarlet variant that can be co-imaged with GCaMP using
      a single 920-nm laser in <em class="species">Drosophila</em>. Simplifies two-photon setups by
      eliminating the need for a second excitation wavelength when using a red
      structural marker alongside a green calcium indicator.
    </p>
    <a href="https://doi.org/10.64898/2026.04.12.718060">&rarr; bioRxiv</a>
  </div>

</div>
```
